response.original_title: El Guapo vs The Narco Vampires
response.overview: El Guapo, also known as Judas, is a luchador from Tijuana, Mexico, who is on a quest for redemption after betraying his brother José to a powerful narco-vampire cartel. The cartel, known as the Narco Vampires, leads to the brutal deaths of both El Guapo and his brother José or El Ángel. After being sent to Hell, El Guapo is granted a chance at redemption and returns to the living world to protect his brother's family from harm. However, the Narco Vampires still have a hold on him, forcing him to confront his past actions and the demons of his cowardice.
response.tagline: An action-packed tale of death, redemption, tequila and more death
response.title: El Guapo vs The Narco Vampires
